creator: manyperl@SDF.lonestar.org
text:
Many perl port. Hard to find pearls. Some hide in /usr/ports/deskutils,
others h
ide in /usr/ports/mail/. Many many places, yet no /usr/ports/perl5!!! make
me no
 happy pearl finder !  !!

Fix: 

#> mkdir /usr/ports/perl5 && cd /usr/ports && for x in */p5*; do (ln -s $x
perl5
/); done && cd /usr/ports/perl5 && ls
How-To-Repeat: 
I was looking, and did:
$> cd /usr/ports && echo */p5* |xargs -n 1 echo

it listed many many thingies, but none in /usr/ports/perl5. Why no
perl5???
